🙏 Prayer Request
Ministry

Odisha Outreach

Reaching unreached districts, tribal communities, and remote villages with the hope of Christ.

State Outreach

Odisha and tribal regions

A dedicated missionfor total transformation.

Odisha Outreach carries a burden for people who have not yet heard the Gospel clearly. Beyond preaching, the ministry trains local leaders, serves tribal communities, and walks patiently with families in remote villages.

Partner With This Ministry Contact Ministry
Field Care

Ministry Burden

Gospel witness with practical love.

District Vision

Every

Reaching toward the whole state

Pastors Trained

1,048+

Leaders strengthened for ministry

Mission Focus

Total

Transformation through Christ

Ministry Focus

Reaching Odisha with Word, prayer, and care

Each part of the outreach is built around people: families in villages, tribal communities, and local leaders who will keep serving after the visit ends.

01

Odisha for Christ

A prayerful initiative to reach unreached districts with the Gospel, pastoral follow-up, and steady local care.

02

The Tribal Harvest

Serving marginalized tribal communities and remote villages through field visits, preaching, and practical compassion.

03

Pastoral Training

Equipping local leaders through mobile Bible training and BTCP-based teaching for long-term spiritual growth.

04

Heart for Odisha

Carrying a dedicated burden for total transformation through prayer, leadership, mercy, and faithful Gospel witness.

Strong local leaders help the Gospel remain.

From Outreach To Growth

Training leaders for lasting fruit.

The goal is not only a meeting, but a growing witness. Through mobile theological education and pastoral training, local ministers are prepared to shepherd people with biblical clarity and compassion.

1

Village outreach among families who have limited access to regular ministry.

2

Pastoral teaching that strengthens local churches and future leaders.

3

Compassion work that meets people with dignity, prayer, and practical care.

4

Consistent field presence across tribal and remote communities.

Odisha State Outreach

Hear From You

✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh
Savior's Heartbeat
Ministries · Est. 1976

Preaching and Preparing People for HIS Coming. Serving communities across India with the transforming love of Jesus Christ since 1976.

“God Holy Spirit may touch you and speak to your heart to fulfill the Savior's Heartbeat.”
